This further reduces damage when defending or using Support Defense.
Reduce damage taken by 20%.

Some units can transform during battle.
Transforming may cause the unit's Movement or usable weapons to change.
This Unit can only be piloted by its designated Linked Character.

Transforms into a different unit when HP falls to 0 during battle (once per battle)
*If the post-evacuation unit only has a terrain capability of "dash", evacuation will not occur.

Transforms into a different unit when HP falls to 0 during battle (once per battle)
*If the post-evacuation unit only has a terrain capability of "dash", evacuation will not occur.

Transforms into a different unit when HP falls to 0 during battle and Vigor is Max or higher (once per battle)
*If the post-evacuation unit only has a terrain capability of "dash", evacuation will not occur.

Transforms into a different unit when HP falls to 0 during battle and Vigor is Max or higher (once per battle)
*If the post-evacuation unit only has a terrain capability of "dash", evacuation will not occur.
